Hero.title: Taste the Italian Wave
Hero.subtitle: Original Gelato & Belgian Waffles in Uzbekistan

About.title: The <highlight>Gusttimo</highlight> Story
About.subtitle: A slice of Italy in the heart of Tashkent.
About.description1: Born from a love for authentic Italian desserts, Gusttimo is where tradition meets modern quick service.
About.description2: Whether you are here for a quick bite, a family treat, or a sweet escape, our gelato and Belgian waffles are made fresh daily using only the finest ingredients.

Menu.title: Our Menu
Menu.subtitle: Discover our special flavors
Menu.descriptionFallback: A delicious treat crafted with premium ingredients and our signature recipe.

1.name: Aliya K.
1.text: Best Belgian waffles in the city! The Nutella one is to die for.

2.name: Rustam T.
2.text: Chocolate cheesecake was absolutely delicious. Premium quality.

3.name: Zuhra N.
3.text: Prices are very reasonable for such high quality gelato. My kids love it.

4.name: Timur A.
4.text: Authentic Italian taste right here in Tashkent. Smooth service too.

5.name: Feruza I.
5.text: The presentation is top notch, and the vibe is perfect for a weekend date.

CTA.title: Craving something sweet?
CTA.subtitle: Order now in 1 click or visit us today.
